title: Checkmate
description: Gives you the opportunity to play a chess game of any size anywhere in the minecraft world.
body:
# Chess
Playing Minecraft is a pleasure for many, so why not combine it with chess, an ancient game that has existed for over one and a half thousand years?

---

## Mechanics

### How to Obtain the Chessboard?
There are two ways to get the chess set:

1. **Crafting**
   Craft the chess set using 9 items:
   - Chiseled Deepslate
   - Polished Deepslate Wall
   - Polished Diorite
   - Diorite Wall
   - Redstone
   - 2x Black Terracotta
   - Brown Terracotta
2. **Command**
   If commands are enabled in the accessibility settings, use the following command:
   ```
   /function main:give_item
   ```
    ![The video shows the complete process of crafting chess in a crafting table](https://i.imgur.com/avJFpyi.gif)
---

## Operating Modes

### Adjusting Chessboard and Piece Sizes
You can adjust the size of the chessboard and pieces (the default size is 1). You can increase or decrease it as follows:

- **To Increase Size:**
  1. Pick up the chess set after obtaining it.
  2. Hold down the **Shift** key.
  3. Move the mouse cursor **above the middle of the screen**.
  4. Right-click.

- **To Decrease Size:**
  1. Perform the same steps as increasing the size, but move the mouse cursor **below the middle of the screen**.

>   ![The video shows the complete process of crafting chess in a crafting table](https://i.imgur.com/fZrlmo7.gif)
---
### Playing Chess
To play chess:
- Right-click on the chessboard while **Shift is not pressed**.

> ![This video shows how to place a chessboard on a plane according to the previous steps in the instructions](https://i.imgur.com/SlBGbuq.gif)
---

### Picking Up the Chessboard
To pick up the chessboard:
1. Hold down the **Shift** key.
2. Look straight up while standing near the chessboard.

Once picked up, the chessboard will appear in your inventory.

>  ![It shows how to raise a chessboard that stands in the world, according to the rules described earlier](https://i.imgur.com/KoWRzTJ.gif)

Currently, the rules of the chessboard do not match the most common ones, which will be corrected in the future.

At the moment, there is a datapack, which is also a resourcepack!
